title: DOOM II SSG
description: Replaces Crossbow with a Double-barrel Shotgun (aka SSG) from DOOM II
body:
## _Featuring_
- New Crossbow models, textures & sounds _(using original sounds from DOOM II*)_
- New Arrow & Tipped Arrow textures
- Text replacements for ```English [US/UK], Russian/Русский, Japanese/日本語```

_***DOOM 2 and its assets are the property of ID Software and its respective owners**_
